chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-570 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.23853/2023 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 10.12.2025 Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. Same was the position on 26.04.2023. Further perusal of the record reveals that the petitioner has taken no meaningful steps to advance the proceedings. The conduct of the petitioner reflects a clear lack of interest in pursuing the instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
